sql: SELECT u1.signup_date, u1.id, u1.country_code, u1.is_verified FROM users AS u1
nl_prompt: Get u1.signup_date, u1.id, u1.country_code, u1.is_verified from users (as u1).

sql: SELECT * FROM users AS u1 WHERE u1.is_verified = 0
nl_prompt: Get all columns from users (as u1) where u1.is_verified eq 0.

sql: SELECT c1.comment_text, c1.id, c1.user_id, c1.post_id FROM comments AS c1 ORDER BY c1.user_id
nl_prompt: Get c1.comment_text, c1.id, c1.user_id, c1.post_id from comments (as c1) ordered by c1.user_id.

sql: SELECT f1.followed_at, f1.followee_id, f1.follower_id FROM follows AS f1 WHERE f1.followed_at <= DATETIME('now', '-28 days') ORDER BY f1.follower_id LIMIT 87
nl_prompt: Get f1.followed_at, f1.followee_id, f1.follower_id from follows (as f1) where f1.followed_at less than or equal to 28 days ago ordered by f1.follower_id limited to 87 results.

sql: SELECT c1.id, c1.post_id, c1.comment_text FROM comments AS c1 LIMIT 35
nl_prompt: Get c1.id, c1.post_id, c1.comment_text from comments (as c1) limited to 35 results.

sql: SELECT * FROM comments AS c1
nl_prompt: Get all columns from comments (as c1).

nl_prompt: Get u1.username, u1.is_verified, u1.id from users (as u1).

sql: SELECT c1.comment_text, c1.created_at FROM comments AS c1
nl_prompt: Get c1.comment_text, c1.created_at from comments (as c1).

sql: SELECT * FROM comments AS c1 WHERE c1.user_id >= 560
nl_prompt: Get all columns from comments (as c1) where c1.user_id greater than or equal to 560.

sql: SELECT * FROM comments AS c1 FULL JOIN posts AS p4 ON c1.post_id = p4.id
nl_prompt: Get all columns from comments (as c1) FULL JOIN posts on c1.post_id eq p4.id.

sql: SELECT p7.content, p7.user_id, p7.id, p7.posted_at FROM comments AS c1 LEFT JOIN posts AS p7 ON c1.post_id = p7.id WHERE p7.id >= 925
nl_prompt: Get p7.content, p7.user_id, p7.id, p7.posted_at from comments (as c1) LEFT JOIN posts on c1.post_id eq p7.id where p7.id greater than or equal to 925.

sql: SELECT * FROM follows AS f1 RIGHT JOIN users AS u5 ON f1.follower_id = u5.id
nl_prompt: Get all columns from follows (as f1) RIGHT JOIN users on f1.follower_id eq u5.id.

sql: SELECT * FROM users AS u1 FULL JOIN follows AS f4 ON u1.id = f4.follower_id
nl_prompt: Get all columns from users (as u1) FULL JOIN follows on u1.id eq f4.follower_id.

sql: SELECT u6.country_code, f1.followee_id, u6.is_verified FROM follows AS f1 RIGHT JOIN users AS u6 ON f1.follower_id = u6.id WHERE u6.id <= 408
nl_prompt: Get u6.country_code, f1.followee_id, u6.is_verified from follows (as f1) RIGHT JOIN users on f1.follower_id eq u6.id where u6.id less than or equal to 408.

sql: SELECT * FROM posts AS p1 RIGHT JOIN likes AS l7 ON p1.id = l7.post_id WHERE l7.post_id <> 846
nl_prompt: Get all columns from posts (as p1) RIGHT JOIN likes on p1.id eq l7.post_id where l7.post_id neq 846.

sql: SELECT u2.id, u2.username, f1.follower_id, f1.followee_id FROM follows AS f1 FULL JOIN users AS u2 ON f1.follower_id = u2.id WHERE u2.is_verified = 0
nl_prompt: Get u2.id, u2.username, f1.follower_id, f1.followee_id from follows (as f1) FULL JOIN users on f1.follower_id eq u2.id where u2.is_verified eq 0.

sql: SELECT u5.id, f1.followed_at, u5.email, u5.country_code FROM follows AS f1 FULL JOIN users AS u5 ON f1.follower_id = u5.id WHERE u5.email <> 'user7@example.com'
nl_prompt: Get u5.id, f1.followed_at, u5.email, u5.country_code from follows (as f1) FULL JOIN users on f1.follower_id eq u5.id where u5.email neq 'user7@example.com'.

sql: SELECT * FROM users AS u1 LEFT JOIN follows AS f5 ON u1.id = f5.follower_id

sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM users AS inner_users WHERE inner_users.is_verified = 1) AS derived_table WHERE derived_table.id <= 493
nl_prompt: Get all columns from users filtered by inner_users.is_verified eq 1 (as derived_table) where derived_table.id less than or equal to 493.

sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM posts AS inner_posts WHERE inner_posts.view_count = 270) AS derived_table
nl_prompt: Get all columns from posts filtered by inner_posts.view_count eq 270 (as derived_table).

sql: SELECT l1.user_id, l1.post_id FROM likes AS l1 WHERE l1.user_id IN (SELECT sub_u.id FROM users AS sub_u WHERE sub_u.signup_date <= DATETIME('now', '-10 days'))
nl_prompt: Get l1.user_id, l1.post_id from likes (as l1) where l1.user_id is in (Select sub_u.id from users where sub_u.signup_date less than or equal to 10 days ago).

sql: SELECT f1.follower_id AS user, f2.followee_id AS friend_of_friend FROM follows AS f1 JOIN follows AS f2 ON f1.followee_id = f2.follower_id WHERE f1.follower_id <> f2.followee_id
nl_prompt: Get f1.follower_id, f2.followee_id from follows (as f1) JOIN follows on f1.followee_id eq f2.follower_id where f1.follower_id neq f2.followee_id.
